# `ai.ron` — field reference

<!-- GENERATED by `cargo run -p dc_data_docs` (dronecom #2815). Do not edit: field docs live as /// comments on the Rust structs. -->

Data: [`config/ai.ron`](../config/ai.ron)

## `AiConfig`

System-level AI settings that don't vary by personality.

Loaded from `assets/config/ai.ron`.

### `evaluation_interval` : f32

How often the commander re-evaluates advisors (seconds).

### `launch_timeout` : f32

Maximum seconds a goal may wait in `AwaitingLaunch` for its launched
unit to become airborne before the launch is declared failed and the
goal abandoned (releasing its claimed units). Backstop for launch
commands the deck-ops handler rejects — every rejection path is
warn-and-return with no feedback signal, leaving the unit stowed
`Ready` forever (DC-1073). Generous: must exceed the worst-case deck
launch pipeline duration for a full squad queued behind other
launches.

### `procurement_interval_secs` : f32

Cadence (seconds) between AI Quartermaster procurement passes (#327).
A dedicated slow cadence keeps spending bounded across cycles; the
pass is gated on this interval in `tick_ai_core`.
